creator: gabor@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->repocopy

I received the good patch via private mail. Please do a repocopy 
from www/jakarta-tomcat41 to www/tomcat41, as this software has been renamed. 
The newer maintained versions of this software is also present under the 
new naming convention, and this port is now maintained again, it should 
follow them.
